title: Nuke Mod
body:
Adds a fully functional nuke!

(Made with MCreator)

Recipies:
![Crafting Recipe of the nuke](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92a4cd93f6f884564c10b555f675f6366ac129cf.png)
All other recipies are for tools and armor. They are the exact same as the vanilla ones,just with radiated particles instead of iron or cobblestone.
